columns.description: Percentage of tweets that are valid

columns.expression: CASE WHEN `day_of_week` = 1 THEN 'Mon' WHEN `day_of_week` = 2 THEN 'Tue' WHEN `day_of_week` = 3 THEN 'Wed' WHEN `day_of_week` = 4 THEN 'Thu' WHEN `day_of_week` = 5 THEN 'Fri' WHEN `day_of_week` = 6 THEN 'Sat' WHEN `day_of_week` = 7 THEN 'Sun' ELSE 'Unknown' END
CASE WHEN `day_of_week` IN (6, 7) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END
CASE WHEN `metric_name` = 'positive_pct' THEN 'Positive' WHEN `metric_name` = 'negative_pct' THEN 'Negative' WHEN `metric_name` = 'neutral_pct' THEN 'Neutral' ELSE `metric_name` END

columns.description: Numeric version of metric_value for correct aggregation
30-day rolling average of daily tweet count
columns.expression: AVG(`tweet_count`) AGGREGATE OVER (ORDER BY `tweet_date` TRAILING 30 DAY)

columns.description: Hour of day with the highest tweet count

columns.expression: CASE WHEN MAX_BY(`tweet_hour`, `tweet_count`) = 0 THEN '12 AM' WHEN MAX_BY(`tweet_hour`, `tweet_count`) < 12 THEN CONCAT(CAST(MAX_BY(`tweet_hour`, `tweet_count`) AS STRING), ' AM') WHEN MAX_BY(`tweet_hour`, `tweet_count`) = 12 THEN '12 PM' ELSE CONCAT(CAST(MAX_BY(`tweet_hour`, `tweet_count`) - 12 AS STRING), ' PM') END

datasets.name: 31d925f9
queryLines:
SELECT
  t.tweet_date,
  t.tweet_count,
  v.valid_tweet_count
FROM
  tweets_per_day t
    LEFT JOIN valid_tweets_per_day v
      ON t.tweet_date = v.tweet_date

columns.description: Percentage of valid tweets out of total tweets

datasets.name: 0690af54
queryLines:
SELECT
  'Likes' as metric,
  SUM(likes) as total
FROM
  fact_tweet
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Retweets',
  SUM(retweets)
FROM
  fact_tweet
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Replies',
  SUM(replies)
FROM
  fact_tweet

datasets.name: ed617431
queryLines:
SELECT
  sentiment_date,
  'Positive' as sentiment,
  positive_count as count
FROM
  sentiment_over_time
UNION ALL
SELECT
  sentiment_date,
  'Negative' as sentiment,
  negative_count as count
FROM
  sentiment_over_time
UNION ALL
SELECT
  sentiment_date,
  'Neutral' as sentiment,
  neutral_count as count
FROM
  sentiment_over_time

datasets.name: 95d77a5b
queryLines:
SELECT
  sentiment_date,
  'Positive' as sentiment,
  positive_count as count
FROM
  social_catalog.gold.sentiment_over_time
UNION ALL
SELECT
  sentiment_date,
  'Negative',
  negative_count
FROM
  social_catalog.gold.sentiment_over_time
UNION ALL
SELECT
  sentiment_date,
  'Neutral',
  neutral_count
FROM
  social_catalog.gold.sentiment_over_time

columns.expression: CASE WHEN `sentiment_index` > 0.02 THEN 'Positive' WHEN `sentiment_index` < -0.02 THEN 'Negative' ELSE 'Neutral' END

datasets.name: 7e40ac0d
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
  user_id,
  country,
  followers_count,
  following_count,
  posts_count
FROM
  top_users_by_followers
